brand.name: Mary Jane's Place
brand.tagline: Britain's first patient sanctuary for prescribed medical cannabis
brand.national: A nationwide network in the making — flagship sanctuary in Bournemouth, England.

facts.label: Of the UK public support medical prescribing

membership.intro: Every verified patient is a member. The free tier covers everything you need to use the sanctuary; the paid tiers fund the wider mission.

tiers.name: Patient Member
tiers.tagline: Everything you need to use the sanctuary, on us.
features: Verified-patient access to the Bournemouth sanctuary
Use of demonstration vaporisers at £5 per session
Members-only newsletter with UK-wide patient news

tiers.name: Patient Plus
tiers.tagline: Priority access, partner perks and exclusive content.
features: Priority booking for workshops and education evenings
Discounts on equipment and partner products
Early access to new sanctuary locations as we open them

tiers.name: Founding Member
tiers.tagline: Help us build the network — and get the inner circle in return.
features: Invitations to private industry and advocacy events
Direct input into our expansion plans

partnerCategories.title: Prescribing clinics
partnerCategories.blurb: We refer patients who are exploring a prescription, and provide a real-world safe space for clinic patients to use what's prescribed.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Co-branded patient education evenings, clinic-day pop-ups, referral pathways.

partnerCategories.title: Advocacy and community
partnerCategories.blurb: We work alongside the bodies driving reform, hosting events and amplifying patient voices.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Hosting UPA, PLEA, Cancard, Drug Science and Cannabis Industry Council activity in Bournemouth and beyond.

partnerCategories.title: Equipment and pharma
partnerCategories.blurb: We let patients try real devices in a real setting — the most valuable demo space in the UK.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Vaporiser brands, accessory makers, dispensaries and licensed cultivators.

partnerCategories.title: Hospitality and venues
partnerCategories.blurb: If you run a venue and want to be patient-friendly, we'll share the operational playbook.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Hotels, restaurants, members' clubs, retreats and event organisers.

partnerCategories.title: Media and press
partnerCategories.blurb: We speak openly about patient experience, the law and what it really looks like to live with a prescription.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Print, broadcast, podcast and online journalists.

partnerCategories.title: Future sanctuaries
partnerCategories.blurb: If you want to open a Mary Jane's Place in your city — talk to us.
partnerCategories.interestedIn: Patient advocates, operators and investors looking to open a sanctuary in their own town or city.
